name: @ai-sdk/fal
description: The **[fal provider](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/fal)** for the [AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs) contains image model support for the [fal.ai API](https://fal.ai/).
